title: Basic JavaScript Maps and Sets

title: Intermediate JavaScript Maps and Sets

title: Advanced JavaScript Maps and Sets Project
description: Build a small application that applies Map creation and methods, Map vs Object comparison, Set creation and methods in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Maps and Sets
description: The following code has bugs related to Map creation and methods. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Maps and Sets
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Map creation and methods and Map vs Object comparison.
